title: Lysin purification protocol
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"2f0qe","text":"This protocol assumes that salt extracts lysin from the virion rather than from cell walls. Yield seems to confirm this assumption.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3mgcr","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9qcg3","text":"Quality control: lysin assay shows that all chlorophyll has been released and no cell wall material pellets at low speed (wall has been solubilized).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"82lck","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7icg8","text":"The final high speed pellet (after step 8) showed a white layer (virus) remaining in the pellet.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add 150µl purified PBCV incubate 16hrs under fluorescent illumination with a 16 hr light/8 hr dark cycle at 25°C on an orbital shaker (~95 rpm). 16:00:00
Collect cells and virus by centrifugation at 25,000RPM (50.2Ti) for 17 min at 20°C. 00:17:00
Re-suspend cells in 20ml 25mM KOH, 50mM MOPS, 2mM Na 2 EGTA, 0.1M LiCl(pH 7) (wash).
Centrifuge 25,000RPM for 17 min at 20°C, discard supernatant. 00:17:00
Suspend pellet in 1.5ml 25mM KOH, 50mM MOPS (pH 7), 60µl 10M LiCl, 30µl 0.1M Na 2 EGTA incubate 50 min at 37°C. 00:50:00
Centrifuge 25,000RPM for 17 min at 20°C. Collect supernatant (avoid DNA). 00:17:00
creator: Irina Agarkova
